issues.description: OnPlay effect should use 'AddLife' or 'AttachDon' to add DON!! from DON!! deck and set as active. Current 'GiveDon' does not match 'Add up to 1 DON!! card from your DON!! deck and set it as active' — GiveDon generates DON!!, not adds from deck.
OnKO effect destination should be 'lifeCards' not 'hand'. Card text states 'Add up to 1 card from the top of your deck to the top of your Life cards.'
Filter should specify 'fromTop' or similar to indicate 'from the top of your deck' constraint, not generic 'Any'.
